story_title: 場地白模產生器 (階段一)

notes: Story pivoted 2026-07-12: grid-cell editor (completed tasks 1-3) replaced by professional floor-plan editor (Konva.js, polygon floor, line-segment walls, draggable/resizable objects, 0.5m snap).
